description_long: This hammer features a robust, double-sided metal head with a slightly concave profile on each striking face, and a central ridge adorned with small, evenly spaced spikes. The head is a metallic gray, suggesting it is made from steel or a similar durable metal. The handle is straight and appears to be constructed from a combination of metal and reinforced plastic, with orange and black segments that likely provide additional grip and structural support. The handle is attached securely to the head with a visible central joint, and the base of the handle is squared off, possibly for added stability when set down. The overall design is utilitarian and modern, with no visible branding or decorative elements. The hammer appears clean and unused, with no visible signs of wear or damage.
description: A modern, double-sided metal hammer with a spiked central ridge and a reinforced, straight handle featuring orange and black grip sections. The design is robust and utilitarian, with a clean, unused appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the flat, spiked face of the hammer head and the straight handle with orange and black grip sections.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the double-sided, concave hammer head and the central ridge with spikes, as well as the handle's structural details.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, displaying the opposite flat, spiked face and the handle's grip features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view again highlights the double-sided, concave head and the spiked central ridge.
attribute_handle_type: Straight reinforced plastic and metal handle with orange and black grip sections, squared base, and a smooth, ergonomic profile.
attribute_head_type: Double-sided sledge-type head with slightly concave striking faces and a central ridge featuring small spikes.
